An oldie but a goodie.
This one makes me so angry. So f'ing mad.
Shocking how many of these are "I don't think women are people."

item.dc:creator: jeandolly

item.title: MAKE SWORDS GREAT AGAIN ⚔️ Join me in my fight for sword holding normalization!!!
item.description: can't a girl just like to pose with a sword nowadays damn ⚔️ I am not being really serious in this video by the way, I thought it was really funny that holding swords would polarize opinions so much hahaha OH but I was beung serious about putting a sword in as many character's hands as I can even if it isn't canon Edit : Yes the video is slightly sped up. Why? Well, I posted it at normal speed on other platforms (you can watch it at NORMAL SPEED HERE : https://www.instagram.com/reel/C51n727Sot1/ ) but Imgur limit is only 60seconds per video only and I tried my best to reduce the length but I HAD TOO MUCH TO SAY ? about swords I guess that I couldn't see which part I could cut further, so I increased speed to have the video go from 90 seconds to 60 seconds. Mystery solved hehe!!

item.title: Salma Hayek Says Her Family Won't Let Her Take Swimsuit Photos in 'Peace'
item.description:
(I did not make this video).
Salma Hayek can't get a moment of peace as she tries to take some bikini photos. On Monday, April 15, the actress, 57, shared several photos to Instagram of her attempts to pose in her swimsuit as she gets out of a pool — only to be foiled by her family spraying water from a hose in her face as she climbs up the ladder. "When your family won’t let you take a bikini ріс in peace."
And a throwback ...
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: I'm tired, boss.
item.description: Normally one looks forward to hearing about an MRI coming back with negative results on anything serious, but I was honestly banking on the hope that there was. The doctor said that at this point, it'd be in my best interest to pursue a path to help identify the cause of this pain, suggesting that it might be some sort of hereditary thing, but I've never known any family, living or non, that had to deal with this sort of issue. She said it could be something like arthritis or another disability, too. 90% of my work experience is in retail (stocking) or physical labor jobs, so I have minimal relevant experience in career paths that I COULD strive for with the potential of this. It certainly doesn't help that money's already tight. All I know is that I'm so very tired. In any case, thanks for tuning in to another installment of my whining. And if you haven't heard it yet today, or don't hear it enough: I love you and am proud of all you've done. As always, Shine Brightly, Beautiful People. Viral edit: Thank you to everyone who offered support, either through kind words or by helping me realize that this doctor in all likelihood sucks. Thankfully, she was my Workman's Comp doctor and not my Primary- who, by the way, has been great towards me. Hopefully he can help me explore more avenues as he has readily done so for other issues of mine in the past. And while I'm not looking forward to the inevitable medical costs for this, I had already planned on filling medical bankruptcy at some point in my life due to upcoming transition costs. I'm admittedly feeling a bit overwhelmed by all these potential solutions, so I'll have to sleep on it and hopefully discuss it with my primary soon. Thank you for all of your help~♡
item.dc:creator: MatronOfMorgues

item.title: Dumpin' memes and closing tabs pt. 3 ft. Sqwimble and Bouny
item.description:
Gentle reminder to take your meds and hydrate. Maybe slap a butt or two.
Eat a tot (smiling human child), become a fried potato snack (delicious).
Be the dark magic you want to see in the world. Believe in yourself.
Love me some deviled eggs. Let's polarize the comments! I make mine with finely chopped ginger and bacon. I don't usually bother with paprika, though.
Home is where you have the right toilet paper.
Lookin' like a snack. Or he might need a snack. I would share my snack with Chomsky. Or you! My snack is a cupckake. It's chocolate.
I will if I get enthusiastic verbal confirmation that the frog wants to boogie.
But the fire is also [REDACTED]. And there's simply no place to [REDACTED] [REDACTED], [REDACTED], [REDACTED]
I hear that [REDACTED] is a good example of this.
Heh. Sea nanners.
I can't stand it when I just had a thing and now I can't seem to find it anywhere. I'm a big fan of those modular wire cube shelves. I put that shit everywhere!
I'd watch this documentary, especially if it were actually Attenborough narrating. The jet is basically a whale fall to the excavator.
I had a simple dream. Use CRISPR to allow humans to grow the cones that would allow us to see all the colors, or just transplant the cones from shrimp to human. But my dream... it died before it could even breathe. Goddamn shrimp. Shrimps is bugs.
Sent this one to my dad. He hasn't forgiven me yet.
Joke's on you, Kirby. My socks are already full of beans! TOE BEANS! GOTTEM!!!! *air horn BWAWAWAWAAAAAAA*
I recognize that the social group has made a nonverbal decision, but given that it's a stupid-ass decision, I've elected to ignore it (at least until it's put into words directed specifically at me. Other terms and conditions may apply.)
Sheeeit, baby! If you got the iridescent deep-V shirt, I'll wear it. All you had to do was ask!
When celestial bodies are judging you at the Waffle House like o.O maybe you should rethink your behavior. Tip your servers better and be less of an asshat. No, you don't need Stevia for your coffee.
Frogie. I wish I could use you as an example, but... I can't just stay in the tub in order to stay safe. I'll get all pruny, unlike you. Also, Doordash won't bring food and alcohol into my bathroom any more. Not since... the incident...
Hops are useful for flavoring and preservation, and many people enjoy IPAs. They are allowed to be wrong. They'll probably tell me that I'm wrong in the comments. I can guarantee you that they won't change my mind. I'm not interested in even trying to change theirs. My grandpapa had a saying that stuck with me: "Let people live and die with their shitty ideas," he'd say, "just make sure you've got a good knife. It can save your life." I think that's... generally true. You can also usually use a decent knife to open a beer, so it's... kind of related, topically. Pass the whiskey.
I. WANT. CROWS. I want to raise them from smol 'ggs. I want to talk to them, and have them talk to me. I want to share my food with them and enjoy the surprises of their individual personalities. I, frankly, would prefer them over human children, at least at the moment. All I really need is to figure out how to get them to consistently poop outside. I think that might be a lynchpin in my plan.
I'm not quite this spiteful. It ends with something more along the lines of "well fine, be that way, then. I'll pet you eventually, you fluffy jerk."
What is French type super-effective against, and what does it resist? Fuck, I could go for a croissant right now... with raspberry jam, butter, and whipped cream. And chocolate sauce! Maybe I want a crepe...
If Tom doesn't pick an onion, you won't have onions on your sandwich, friend. Onions don't grow on trees.
The baby has a lot to say, and I'm here to listen. Mrrp!
Billy didn't heed the dosage warnings. Don't be like Billy. Adderall etiquette. Super simple stuff.
Yes, who do I talk to about restoring a save point?
What do you think Sqwimble does?
I, too, would be like "bro, what the fuck" if this happened to me.
The first four bring gentle tears to my eyes. The last makes me want to try out the thing where you put up a fake wasp nest because they're territorial and won't compete for a location.
"BuT iT bOmBeD tHe FiRsT tImE, iT wOuLdN't Be A gOoD iNvEsTmEnT!" Ssssshhhhut the fuck up. If it cratered before, it has nowhere to go but up. My nostalgia gland has been squeezed dry.
Give the ol' bunghole a lil' splishity-splashety. Hopefully you have warm water.
Ok, first: I would never AGGRESSIVELY blow kissies at froggies. You do that gently, and with respect, or you don't do it at all. Second: I tell the trees that I love them by poking them, and they have told me that they understand this better than by brain-beams. So. Do with that information what you will.
Why did you think you needed a gun at Cracker Barrel, Darwin Award winner?
Call it a hunch.
At what point does it stop being a soup and just become flavored mayo? How large is this pot, and why are so many people allowed to contribute to it without someone intervening? HAS someone already claimed authority and decided that this is acceptable? If so, what kind of local values led to this decision?! I have SO MANY questions.
I love bouny.
Plomp d owls
McChicken looks like he's having an existential crisis over his name.
I think I'm better at letting go of grudges than I used to be. I've got one person who I refuse to forgive until they FUCKING APOLOGIZE. "How many times do I have to apologize for that?" 'Once would be nice.' "mm... no."
Chonks that are doing things are just chonks that are not doing things, doing things. I am one of those chonks, and those are the things that Im doing. (Wtf am I even saying here? It sounds like it's AI-generated...)
I love it. Approve it, legislate it, print it. Look! This chonk is doing a flag!
This chonk is doing an iconic music.
I looked for this for 20 minutes and had to give up. Then I looked later the same day and found it in seconds. Nothing makes sense and I need a nap. Also, "The missile has had a very long day of splashing bandits" makes me imagine the kitten in a little kiddy pool with other baby pets dressed up like Mexican banditos, just a splish-splashin' each other. Then they get wrapped up in their towels and eat their sandwiches with chips in them and drink juice boxes. And then, of course, eepy nap time because everyone's all tuckered out.
Most of human history, if we're being honest. Rabble rabble rabble.
If I was trying to eat my Subway cookie and a goblin didn't just sit down across the table from me, but PHASED THROUGH THE CHAIR TO QUANTUM SHIT IN THE 5TH DIMENSION I might need a toke, too. Also? Nice shirt, ma'am. *fist bump*
Shrimps is bugs. Shrimps and chickens have opened up a fried rice food truck together. Fuckers are thinking about turning it into a franchise. I think there's some underlying sexual/romantic tension there, but that they aren't ready to open that door yet. I'm hopeful for them. They make a good team.
Poor JoCat. He didn't deserve what happened to him. I miss the wibbledy-wobbledy dragon head at the end of the Crap Guide to DnD videos he made.
Ponder an orb. Heck, ponder TWO orbs. That comment will get this post deleted by mods, inconsistent prudes that they are. You heard me, mods! Get on my level!
This cat, in the process of pondering an orb, believes it has attained sorcerous powers. Let it believe.
Six seasons and a movie.
My favorite: the cookie formerly known as Tagalong. Why did they change the name?
Blaze your own trail. Walk toward those badass-looking mountains.
That's... why I'm here.
Usually Yoshi. Peach if Yoshi is already taken.
Isn't it going to get buried in sand after a while? Does it have a self-cleaning function? I can't help but think that (electronic device) plus (unforgiving desert) doesn't equal (will work for the rest of time). In fact, the first time the Blessed Rains of Africa (TM, C, R) hit this thing, it'll short out. Poetic.
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne
